title: PwC India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: PwC India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
PwC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About PwC India:
PwC India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PwC India!
